category_sources: source_facts.description says Open Inventor 2.1 API implementation; official Coin3D site describes Coin as an OpenGL-based 3D graphics library compatible with Open Inventor 2.1.
display_name_sources: official homepage heading uses Coin3D; source_facts.name is coin3d.
docs_sources: official Coin3D homepage lists available documentation for Coin 4.x and links the GitHub wiki as the web site resource.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has official repository URL; per instruction returned null without second-guessing.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official Coin3D homepage and GitHub README describe an OpenGL-based 3D graphics library and Open Inventor API implementation; official GitHub topics include opengl, rendering, scenegraph, 3d-graphics, and open-inventor.
